name: CheckSmart
description_short: CheckSmart Lakewood, Ohio — CheckSmart is an in-person financial services store in Columbus, OH offering check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bi...
description_long:
CheckSmart is a multi-location retail financial services company with a strong presence across Ohio, including several stores in the Columbus metro area. This location sits on the northeast corner of Morse Rd and Cleveland Ave in Columbus, serving customers who need in-person access to a range of financial services. CheckSmart has positioned itself as a one-stop financial services shop for consumers who may lack access to traditional banking.

The store's core services include check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and in-store bill payment. Customers can also obtain a Green Dot Visa Debit Card, exchange unused gift cards for cash on the spot, and access short-term loan products. Notably, CheckSmart does not directly originate loans in Ohio — instead, it connects customers with an unaffiliated third-party lender, acting as a facilitator rather than the creditor. Customers are encouraged to schedule an appointment online before visiting to streamline the in-store process.

What sets CheckSmart apart from a typical bank or credit union is its focus on immediate, walk-in financial services for consumers who may be unbanked or underbanked. The store offers extended hours on Fridays (8:00 AM – 8:00 PM) and is open seven days a week, including Sundays. The combination of loan access, check cashing, and prepaid card services under one roof is the core value proposition. The online appointment scheduling feature also helps reduce wait times for loan applicants.

Honestly assessed, CheckSmart is a practical option for consumers who need fast, in-person financial services without a traditional bank account. However, because loans are provided by an unnamed third-party lender, CheckSmart has no disclosed control over interest rates, fees, or loan terms — and none of this information appears on the website. Short-term emergency loans of this nature typically carry very high APRs, and prospective borrowers should request full rate disclosures before signing any agreement. The gift card exchange and check cashing services are straightforward and transparent by comparison.
pros: Multiple financial services available in a single in-store visit (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay)
Green Dot Visa Debit Card available in-store — useful for unbanked customers needing a prepaid card
Gift card exchange for cash on the spot without mailing or waiting
Online appointment scheduling reduces in-store wait time for loan applicants
Extended Friday hours (8:00 AM – 8:00 PM) accommodate customers who work standard hours
Open seven days a week including Sundays
Multiple Columbus-area locations for geographic convenience
cons: Loans are facilitated through an unaffiliated third-party lender — CheckSmart does not control rates, fees, or approval criteria
No loan APR, fee schedule, or rate range disclosed anywhere on the website
In-person visit required for all services — no fully online loan application or remote access
Sunday hours are significantly limited (11:00 AM – 5:00 PM only)
Short-term emergency loan products of this type typically carry triple-digit APRs
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers without a bank account
Ohio residents who need fast access to a short-term loan and prefer face-to-face service
Consumers holding unused gift cards who want immediate cash value
People who need a prepaid debit card (Green Dot Visa) and want to get one same-day in-store
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best suited for unbanked or cash-dependent consumers in Ohio who need a single location for check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and quick access to short-term loan products. The primary caveat is that CheckSmart does not directly lend — loans come from an unnamed third party with no rates published — so borrowers must ask for full cost disclosures before committing.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance
Online appointment scheduling for loan applications
Government ID-based identity verification for loan processing
